title: hedysarum hedysaroides f. neglectum
intro: Hedysarum hedysaroides f. neglectum, also known as the small or false Hedysarum, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Hedysarum hedysaroides f. neglectum include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Hedysarum hedysaroides f. neglectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
